description: A purchasable upgrade tree driven by a request flag: spend currency, bump the owned level, apply an effect to a world.state key, with cost growth and prerequisites. All costs/effects are $cfg-driven.

upgrades.description: Array of { id, cost, effectKey?, effectAmount?, maxLevel?, costGrowth?, requires? }; cost/effectAmount/maxLevel/costGrowth are $cfg values.

levelsKey.description: world.state record of upgradeId → owned levels.

requestKey.description: world.state key holding a pending buy request.
